hypothesis: If ML-SSNEB employing pretrained eqV2 or eSEN to produce ML-converged images before restarting DFT, then the DFT SSNEB calculations for CsPbI3 and TiO2 will require fewer iterations and less total computational time than VASP-only SSNEB while yielding MEPs and transition states that satisfy the DFT convergence criterion (atomic forces <0.01 eV/Å) and reproduce DFT energetics.
